steps.title: Match the museum antecedent
steps.content: The blank needs a possessive pronoun for "The Eiteljorg Museum." The antecedent is singular and nonhuman, so the possessive must be singular and gender-neutral.

steps.title: Choose the possessive form
steps.content: Choice A is plural and does not agree with the singular museum. Choice B is the contraction "it is," not a possessive. Choice C is masculine and refers to a person, not a museum. The singular possessive pronoun fits the collection belonging to the museum. The answer is D.
